data.content: Implemented foolery prompt support for --remove, --dry-run, and --help in scripts/install.sh; documented the new options in README.md; and added end-to-end CLI regression coverage in src/lib/__tests__/prompt-cli.test.ts. Verified with bash -n scripts/install.sh, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Branch: work/foolery-c38b; commit: f846d4e9458b.
